title: Grilled Pork Thit Nuong
description: A popular Vietnamese-style grilled pork dish, marinated in a sweet and savory mixture. Serve with fresh herbs and steamed rice.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine soy sauce, sugar, fish sauce, lime juice, and nuong. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together marinade and sliced pork thit. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Remove pork from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill pork for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer pork to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes. Slice into thin strips.
Serve pork with fresh cilantro, chopped garlicky bun, and steamed rice.
